message:
docs: add exported session transcript of building the encrypted GH issues system

Full Claude Code session transcript showing the development of
gh-issue-decrypt from initial concept through multiple review passes,
bug fixes, fleet testing, and skill creation.

Exported via `cass export-html` (self-contained, dark theme, no CDNs).
577 messages covering:
  - Initial age installation and keypair generation
  - Script development with installer-workmanship quality standards
  - 6 fresh-eyes review passes catching 15+ bugs
  - Skill creation optimized per sw guidelines
  - End-to-end fleet testing that caught the critical self-install bug
  - README article matching existing repo conventions

Scrubbed of sensitive data:
  - Fleet machine hostnames replaced with [fleet-test-host] / [fleet-host-N]
  - SSH host key warnings redacted
  - No IP addresses, secret keys, or tokens present in export
  - User's public age key retained (it's public by design)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
